Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class ModalOperatorSV

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.Modality.Kind
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.JModality.JavaModalityKind
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.ModalOperatorSV
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, SortedOperator, SchemaVariable, Sorted, SyntaxElement, TerminalSyntaxElement
public final class ModalOperatorSV extends JModality.JavaModalityKind implements SchemaVariable
Schema variable matching modal operators.
